name: Patrick Murphy
subject: THANK YOU!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I have some big news to share: Now that the books are closed on the first quarter of 2015, I have some big news to share: **With your help, my Senate campaign has raised over $1.25 million in the first quarter of 2015.** I am overwhelmed by the enormous support we're receiving. We need fresh, new leadership for Florida, and I'm humbled by the trust so many people are placing in me. And while we have a long ways to go in this campaign, this is exactly the kind of support we needed to launch this campaign strong. THANK YOU! Now will you do one more thing to show the public that we're starting strong? Click this button to LIKE my Senate campaign on Facebook: [](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae273a/738133e4/3993f16c/7f9b6635/2678192864/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyforSenate") Let's take back the Senate. Thanks, Patrick Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae273a/738133e4/3993f16c/7f9b6636/2678192864/VEsE/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae273a/738133e4/3993f16c/7f9b6637/2678192864/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").
